columns_wp.rp_hMpc: projected separation r_p in h^-1 Mpc
columns_wp.wp_hMpc: projected correlation function w_p in h^-1 Mpc

columns_ds.R_hMpc: projected radius R in h^-1 Mpc

data_source: van Uitert+2016 Appendix B, Table B2
triple_check: R and rp values match Table B2 column headers
DeltaSigma units stated in table caption (check for h factors)
cross-check 2-3 values against Figure 3, stellar mass bin 2
verify number of bins matches their stated analysis
warning_no_table_b2: The paper has NO Table B2. DeltaSigma data was digitized from Figure 2 PostScript source. wp(rp) is NOT measured in this paper.
warning_bin_mismatch: Paper bins are in log10(M*/h^-2 Msun). With h=0.673, paper M3 maps to 10.58-10.93 Msun. User bin (10.4-10.8 Msun) straddles paper bins M2 (10.23-10.58 Msun) and M3 (10.58-10.93 Msun).
notes: Planck 2013 cosmology (Table 1 of Planck 2013 results XIII). Published best-fit from Table 3 bin 2 of van Uitert+2016.
